posts.author: erfanleduc (erfan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone.
We need a board that integrates with google calendar, which shows all of our staff working hours, out of office days etc. we want to share the board with our clients so that they can see our availability and then scheduling a meeting with us accordingly. Thanks for your attention.
